prompts: First thing I need to do we added like, fucking hundreds of new ads yesterday because we've been working on these accounts for a week, and we made everything perfect. But we forgot the most important fucking thing. Ad copy. So we spent a day or so improving all the ad copy with know, filling out the characters, adding you know SMS quote live chat call Steve, fast service, fucking loads of hooks. But I noticed of all the hundreds of ads we put in on the local account, a lot of them are still recording poor or average scores. So we need to go and improve the scores. The way to do that I mean, I can I can either upload you the AdWords CSV document from AdWords editor But the way to improve the scores is you need the keywords from the ad group in the titles, but not just the keywords try and make a hook out of it? So if the keyword we're missing to get better scores would be an antenna install Perth, you know, that kinda needs to be in the headline. So Steve's antenna in store Perth or something or antenna in store Perth call Steve. Do you know what I mean? So go and get a review of the local account ads and see how many score average excellent or poor.
